---
title: "Motivation"
author: "HS"
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Make sure for your project you use the settings in the template,
# NOT these
# echo = FALSE hides code and will lose you marks in the project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)
```

```{css, echo = FALSE}
/* Echo = FALSE will hide this chunk in your output. DON'T do that in your project. 
By the way, comments in HTML/CSS are indicated differently than in R code */

```

```{r file='poster.R', echo = FALSE}
# Load your packages and write some code in here to produce your image

```
